name: tokenmaxed
description: A Claude-Code-native router that sends each coding task to the cheapest capable, policy-allowed lane — local-first, content-free.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tokenmaxed/core && npm run build -w @tokenmaxed/cli && npm run build -w @tokenmaxed/mcp
scripts.build:plugin: npm run build && npm run build -w @tokenmaxed/plugin
scripts.build:codex-plugin: npm run build && npm run build -w @tokenmaxed/codex-plugin
scripts.build:opencode-plugin: npm run build && npm run build -w @tokenmaxed/opencode-plugin
scripts.build:openclaw-plugin: npm run build && npm run build -w @tokenmaxed/openclaw-plugin
